description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a weathered green exterior and a heavy, split black lid made of ribbed metal panels. The lid is slightly sloped and appears to be hinged at the back, allowing it to be opened for depositing waste. The body of the dumpster is reinforced with horizontal bands and has subtle signs of rust and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor use. There are small wheels at the base for mobility, and protruding side brackets likely serve as lifting points for garbage trucks. No visible handles or warning labels are present on the exterior. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for high-capacity waste collection in urban environments.
description: A large, green, metal dumpster with a split, sloped black lid and reinforced sides, showing signs of outdoor wear and rust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split, ribbed black lid and reinforced green metal body with side brackets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped lid and the depth of the dumpster, with visible wear on the green surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain green metal surface with no visible lid seam or handles, and side brackets protruding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sloped lid and green metal body.
attribute_lid_type: split, sloped, hinged metal lid with two sections, ribbed surface, no visible locking mechanism
